validation.password_min_length: Password must be at least 6 characters long
validation.divided_amount_too_big: The distributed quantity exceeds the available amount
validation.not_all_divided: You have not distributed the entire amount

common.all_entries_will_be_deleted: All entries will be permanently deleted.
common.if_problem_contact_support: If you have any problems, please contact our support.

presets.enter_preset_name: Enter a name for the preset
presets.delete_confirm_message: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"?

errors.unexpected_retry: Oops, something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.unexpected_retry_later: Oops, something went wrong. Please try again later.
errors.link_expired: The link has expired. Please try again.

select_or_draw_area.chose_select_or_draw: Choose existing parcels or draw a custom area.
select_or_draw_area.draw_tip: Use these symbols to start and finish drawing. Tap on the map to set corner points. Press and hold the corner points to move them.

errors.email_taken: This email is already in use

forgot_password.enter_email: Please enter your email to reset your password.
forgot_password.reset_link_sent: An email has been sent to {{email}} to reset your password.
forgot_password.mail_being_deliverd: It may take a moment for the email to arrive. If it doesn't appear, please check your spam folder.

farm_name.heading: Welcome to Coltivio!
farm_name.subheading: Enter a name for your farm

modal.heading: Your Farm Registration Number
modal.body: Tap a parcel or manually enter your registration number.

modal_not_found.heading: Your Farm Registration Number
modal_not_found.body: Unfortunately, we could not find any parcels at your location. The Cantons of Obwalden, Nidwalden and Waadt are unfortunately not yet supported. You can skip this step and manually draw your plots.

summary.heading: All set!
summary.subheading: Your farm with registration number {{federalFarmId}} is ready.
summary.plots_info: Your plots will be added based on your farm registration number.
summary.crops_info: The current crop will be derived from the usage code.
summary.edit_plots_info: You can edit your plots at any time under 'Plots' or via the map.
summary.press_save_to_finish: Tap Save to create your farm.
summary.no_federal_farm_id: Unfortunately, we could not add your plots automatically. You can add your plots manually under 'Plots' or via the map. We are working to support all locations as soon as possible.

users.verify_new_email_before_in_effect: You must verify your new email address before the change takes effect.
users.email_verified: Your email address has been successfully verified.
users.email_change_verification_sent: An email has been sent to verify your new address. Once verified, your new address will be active.
users.verification_mail_sent: An email has been sent to {{email}} to verify your address.

farm.enter_farm_name_to_delete: To delete your farm, enter the farm name.
farm.chose_option_to_delete_account: To also delete your account, enable 'Delete Account'.

common.draw_area_overlap_info: Overlapping an existing plot will automatically reduce the area.
common.affected_plots_warning: Warning: Overlapping plots will be reduced.

mode_select.message: Select a parcel or draw a new area to create a plot.

parcel_select.heading: Select a Parcel
parcel_select.overlap_info: Overlapping an existing plot will automatically reduce the area.

draw_area.heading: Draw a New Plot
draw_area.drawing_info: Tap on the map to set the corner points of your area. Press and hold the corner points to move them.
draw_area.finish: Press the following symbol to confirm the area.

edit_area.heading: Edit Plot
edit_area.move_markers: Hold corner points until they appear above your finger, then drag them to the desired location.

delete.heading: Delete plot {{name}}?
delete.entries_warning: All records for this plot will be permanently deleted.
delete.confirm_by_typing_name: Type the plot name to confirm deletion.

split_onboarding.welcome_body: Split a plot into multiple parts. You can draw a line or cut out an area.
split_onboarding.line_body: Draw a line across the plot to split it in two. Tap on the map to set points, and confirm with the cut symbol.
split_onboarding.area_body: Draw a polygon within the plot to cut out a new area. This is useful when you want to separate a specific section.

split.heading: Split Plot
split.mode_select_message: Choose how you want to split the plot.
split.line_tip: Draw a line across the plot to split it.
split.polygon_tip: Draw an area within the plot to cut it out.
split.split_failed: Split failed. Make sure the line fully crosses the plot.

summary.heading: Confirm Split
summary.strategy_keep_reference_info: The original plot will be kept as a reference. All existing entries (crop rotations, harvests, etc.) remain assigned to the reference plot.
summary.strategy_delete_and_migrate_info: The original plot will be deleted. All existing entries will be transferred to the selected sub-plot.

merge.heading: Merge Plots
merge.select_plots: Select the plots to be merged.

summary.heading: Confirm Merge
summary.strategy_keep_reference_info: The original plots will be kept as a reference. All existing entries remain assigned to the reference plots.
summary.strategy_delete_and_migrate_info: The original plots will be deleted. All existing entries will be transferred to the new plot.
summary.strategy_delete_crop_rotation_warning: Crop rotations will not be transferred and will be lost.

merge_onboarding.welcome_body: Select the plots you want to merge. The current plot is already selected.
merge_onboarding.confirm_body: Press the confirm icon once at least 2 plots are selected.

map_onboarding.browse_body: Tap a plot on the map or search for it using the list icon to view details.
map_onboarding.browse_expand_info: Expand the drawer to see more details.
map_onboarding.tools_body: Use the toolbox to manage your plot areas.

crop_protection_equipments.only_same_unit_warning: Attention: To use a machine for a plant protection product, it must have the same unit.

harvest_equipments.info_default_values: Default values can be adjusted as needed.

fertilizer_spreaders.only_same_unit_warning: Attention: To use a machine for a fertilizer, it must have the same unit.

onboarding.welcome_body: Here you manage all activities related to your fields: crops, tillage, fertilization, crop protection, and harvest.
onboarding.done_body: You can change the settings at any time via the gear icon.

divide_on_plots.heading: How should the harvest be distributed?

select_how.heading: How was it harvested?
select_how.no_machinery: You have not recorded any machines yet. They simplify harvest recording by allowing you to predefine default values.

fertilizers.product_in_use_warning: This fertilizer is in use and cannot be deleted.
fertilizers.warning_unit_not_editable: The unit defines in which unit the fertilizer is applied.
fertilizers.unit_info: Select in which unit (e.g. liter) the fertilizer is applied.
fertilizers.default_machine_info: To simplify recording, a machine can be defined with which this fertilizer is applied.

divide_on_plots.heading: How should the applied amount be distributed?

select_machine.heading: Which machine was used?
select_machine.no_machines: Record machines to simplify data entry.
select_machine.only_same_unit_warning: Use equipment matching the fertilizer's unit.

crops.crop_in_use_warning: This crop is in use and therefore cannot be deleted.

crop_families.family_in_use_warning: This crop family is in use and therefore cannot be deleted.

select_product.heading: Which crop protection product was used?
select_product.no_products_message: No crop protection products recorded yet

select_equipment.heading: Which equipment was used?
select_equipment.only_same_unit_warning: Use equipment matching the product's unit.
select_equipment.no_matching_equipment_message: No matching equipment recorded. Record equipment to simplify data entry.

divide_on_plots.heading: How should the applied amount be distributed?

crop_protection_product.product_in_use_warning: This product is in use and cannot be deleted.
crop_protection_product.warning_unit_not_editable: Attention, the unit cannot be edited! It should correspond to the unit in which the plant protection product is applied.
crop_protection_product.unit_info: Select in which unit (e.g. liter) the product is applied.
crop_protection_product.default_machine_info: To simplify recording, a machine can be defined with which this product is applied.

select_crop.heading: Plan the crop rotation for a crop

crop_rotations.cannot_delete_warning: This is the only crop on this plot and therefore cannot be deleted.
crop_rotations.overlap_warning: Date range overlaps with an existing crop rotation.
crop_rotations.permanent_end_date_info: The end date of the existing crop rotation will be automatically set to the day before the new start date.

plan.title: Crop Rotation Planning
plan.select_crop_for_all: Please select a crop for all crop rotations
plan.resolve_conflicts_alert: Please resolve all date conflicts before saving

field_calendar.heading: Field Calendar Export
field_calendar.subheading: Export the field calendar as an Excel document.
field_calendar.confirmation: The generated Excel document will be sent to you via email at {{email}}.
field_calendar.export_sent_to: The document has been sent to {{email}}.
field_calendar.export_mail_being_deliverd: It may take a moment for the email to arrive. If it doesn't appear, please check your spam folder.

agri_coltivio.subheading: Together for free and independent agriculture
agri_coltivio.section_1: AgriColtivio, which developed this app, is a non-profit association aimed at strengthening small and medium-sized farms.
agri_coltivio.section_2: This app is open source, meaning that the source code is publicly accessible - transparent and verifiable.
agri_coltivio.section_3_bold: Data security is a top priority.
agri_coltivio.section_3: All data is stored exclusively on servers within the EU and is subject to strict GDPR data protection regulations.
agri_coltivio.section_4: The operation and further development of this app are funded solely through voluntary donations.
agri_coltivio.section_5_title: Help ensure the app remains free and independent for everyone.
agri_coltivio.section_5: Become a member or support us with a donation. Every contribution helps – big or small.
agri_coltivio.section_6: Thank you for being part of it.

map_draw_onboarding.welcome_body: You are about to select your plots or draw an area on the map. Here is a quick explanation of how it works.
map_draw_onboarding.select_body: Tap on your plots to select or deselect them.
map_draw_onboarding.draw_body: Tap this symbol to start drawing mode. Then tap on the map to set corner points. Press and hold a corner point to move it.
map_draw_onboarding.finish_body: Tap this symbol to finish the area.
map_draw_onboarding.welcome_body_draw: You are about to draw a new plot on the map. Here is a quick explanation of how it works.
map_draw_onboarding.welcome_body_parcel: You are about to select an existing parcel. Here is a quick explanation of how it works.
map_draw_onboarding.parcel_body: Tap on a parcel to select it. If your parcel is not visible, press 'Load Parcels' to load the parcels at the current map position.
map_draw_onboarding.welcome_body_edit: You are about to edit the shape of a plot. Here is a quick explanation of how it works.
map_draw_onboarding.edit_intro_body: Move the corner points to adjust the shape. Press and hold a corner point and drag it to the desired position.
map_draw_onboarding.cancel_body: Tap this symbol to cancel and go back.
map_draw_onboarding.overlap_body: If your new plot overlaps existing plots, they will be automatically adjusted.
map_draw_onboarding.crop_rotation_welcome_body: Select the plots for which you want to plan crop rotations.
map_draw_onboarding.plots_map_tap_body: Tap on a plot to see details.
map_draw_onboarding.plots_map_add_body: Press this button to add new plots.

onboarding.welcome_body: Here you manage your animals, ear tags, medications and treatments.
onboarding.done_body: You can change the settings at any time via the gear icon.

animals.outdoor_journal_category_info: The category is automatically determined. You can override it by enabling a custom category.
animals.delete_custom_categories_confirm: This will delete all custom category entries.
animals.outdoor_journal_info: This journal is automatically generated from the outdoor schedules of the herds and the defined animal categories.

herds_onboarding.step1_body: Group your animals into herds and create outdoor schedules. These are automatically used for the outdoor journal.
herds_onboarding.step2_body: When an outdoor schedule changes, do not edit the existing schedule. Instead, set the 'Until' date and create a new schedule. This preserves the history in the outdoor journal.
herds_onboarding.step3_body: You can now create herds and define outdoor schedules.

tvd_import.title: TVD Import
tvd_import.instructions: Download the livestock as an Excel file from the TVD and upload it here.
tvd_import.onboarding_body: This import requires an Excel file from the "Tierbestand" (livestock) section of TVD. Export it using the "Excel generieren" button.

drugs.drug_in_use_warning: This drug is in use and cannot be deleted.

treatments.drug_not_defined_for_all_types: The drug is not defined for all selected animal types
treatments.different_waiting_times_for_types: Waiting times differ between animal types

settings.disable_onboardings_info: Shows tutorials when opening a feature for the first time.

error.title: Location Disabled!
error.message: We need your location to display it on the map.
